metadata.description: A collection of skills for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: mermaid-to-img
plugins.description: Convert Mermaid diagrams to high-quality images with multiple themes and formats

plugins.name: mac-notifier
plugins.description: Send native macOS notifications when Claude Code completes tasks or awaits user input

plugins.name: text-to-audio
plugins.description: Convert text to natural speech using ChatTTS local AI model

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: Build and maintain persistent personal knowledge base for deep technical research
